'''moradhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:weake|weake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weake|weake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| moradhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:moradhithi|moradhithi]] || [[word:moradhiji|moradhiji]] || [[word:moradhishi|moradhishi]] || [[word:moradhiki|moradhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:moradhuthuthu|moradhuthuthu]] || [[word:moradhujuju|moradhujuju]] || [[word:moradhushushu|moradhushushu]] || [[word:moradhukuku|moradhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:moradhuthu|moradhuthu]] || [[word:moradhuju|moradhuju]] || [[word:moradhushu|moradhushu]] || [[word:moradhuku|moradhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:moradhufthuf|moradhufthuf]] || [[word:moradhufjuf|moradhufjuf]] || [[word:moradhufshuf|moradhufshuf]] || [[word:moradhufkuf|moradhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:moradhethe|moradhethe]] || [[word:moradheje|moradheje]] || [[word:moradheshe|moradheshe]] || [[word:moradheke|moradheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:moradhothotho|moradhothotho]] || [[word:moradhojojo|moradhojojo]] || [[word:moradhoshosho|moradhoshosho]] || [[word:moradhokoko|moradhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:moradhotho|moradhotho]] || [[word:moradhojo|moradhojo]] || [[word:moradhosho|moradhosho]] || [[word:moradhoko|moradhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:moradhofthof|moradhofthof]] || [[word:moradhofjof|moradhofjof]] || [[word:moradhofshof|moradhofshof]] || [[word:moradhofkof|moradhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfthĂŻf|moradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfjĂŻf|moradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfshĂŻf|moradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfkĂŻf|moradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|moradhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|moradhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|moradhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|moradhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfthĂŻf|moradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfjĂŻf|moradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfshĂŻf|moradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfkĂŻf|moradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfthĂŻf|moradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfjĂŻf|moradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfshĂŻf|moradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:moradhĂŻfkĂŻf|moradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:moradhĂŠthĂŠ|moradhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:moradhĂŠjĂŠ|moradhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:moradhĂŠshĂŠ|moradhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:moradhĂŠkĂŠ|moradhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:moradhathatha|moradhathatha]] || [[word:moradhajaja|moradhajaja]] || [[word:moradhashasha|moradhashasha]] || [[word:moradhakaka|moradhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:moradhatha|moradhatha]] || [[word:moradhaja|moradhaja]] || [[word:moradhasha|moradhasha]] || [[word:moradhaka|moradhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:moradhafthaf|moradhafthaf]] || [[word:moradhafjaf|moradhafjaf]] || [[word:moradhafshaf|moradhafshaf]] || [[word:moradhafkaf|moradhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:moradhasha|moradhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:moradhshĂ«sha|moradhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:moradhrosha|moradhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:moradhmusha|moradhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:moradhyasha|moradhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomoradhnkshĂ«sha|gomoradhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomoradhnkrosha|gomoradhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomoradhnkmusha|gomoradhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomoradhnkyasha|gomoradhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:moraradhasha|moraradhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:moraradhshĂ«sha|moraradhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:moraradhrosha|moraradhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:moraradhmusha|moraradhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:moraradhyasha|moraradhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomoraradhnkshĂ«sha|gomoraradhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomoraradhnkrosha|gomoraradhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomoraradhnkmusha|gomoraradhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomoraradhnkyasha|gomoraradhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:merĂŠdhasha|merĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:merĂŠdhshĂ«sha|merĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:merĂŠdhrosha|merĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:merĂŠdhmusha|merĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:merĂŠdhyasha|merĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomerĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gomerĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomerĂŠdhnkrosha|gomerĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomerĂŠdhnkmusha|gomerĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomerĂŠdhnkyasha|gomerĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:morfadhasha|morfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:morfadhshĂ«sha|morfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:morfadhrosha|morfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:morfadhmusha|morfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:morfadhyasha|morfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomorfadhnkshĂ«sha|gomorfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomorfadhnkrosha|gomorfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomorfadhnkmusha|gomorfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomorfadhnkyasha|gomorfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
